name: Nearctic Nickel Mines, Inc.
summary: Nearctic Nickel Mines, Inc. acquires, explores, and mines mineral resources. The company was formerly known as Ungava Minerals Corp. and changed its name to Nearctic Nickel Mines, Inc. in September 2007. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Mississauga, Canada. It has an additional office in Montreal, Canada.
